spec.description: This dashboard works with postgres_exporter for prometheus
Average user and system CPU time spent in seconds.
spec.title: Average CPU Usage

spec.description: Virtual and Resident memory size in bytes, averages over 5 min interval
spec.title: Average Memory Usage

spec.expr: pg_stat_activity_count{datname=~"$datname", instance=~"$instance", state=~"idle|idle in transaction|idle in transaction (aborted)"}

spec.description: Total amount of data written to temporary files by queries in this database. All temporary files are counted, regardless of why the temporary file was created, and regardless of the log_temp_files setting.
spec.title: Temp File (Bytes)

spec.legendFormat: write_time - Total amount of time that has been spent in the portion of checkpoint processing where files are written to disk.
sync_time - Total amount of time that has been spent in the portion of checkpoint processing where files are synchronized to disk.

spec.title: General Counters, CPU, Memory and File Descriptor Stats
PostgreSQL
